dismissalText.long: c †Ishan Kishan b Nitish Kumar Reddy
dismissalText.commentary: Will Jacks c †Ishan Kishan b Nitish Kumar Reddy 46 (22b 5x4 3x6 38m) SR: 209.09

dismissalComment.html: oh my - what an inspired bowling change! Nitish into the attack, and Nitish into the wickets! Length ball outside off and this seams away just a smidgen. Jacks throws his hands at it but for a change, does not middle it. Only musters a faint outside edge and Kishan does the rest. Big, big moment in the game!

dismissalText.commentary: Suryakumar Yadav c Abhishek Sharma b Malinga 5 (5b 1x4 0x6 7m) SR: 100

dismissalComment.html: skied, and SKY falls cheaply again! Bashed in short outside off and this climbs through on SKY. The ball gets big on him as he tries to swipe at it and the ball skews off the top edge. Abhishek moves around to his left at fine leg and snares the chance. SKY's lean run continues, and SRH have gone back-to-back!

dismissalText.commentary: Naman Dhir c Dubey b Hinge 22 (17b 3x4 0x6 27m) SR: 129.41

dismissalComment.html: goes a mile up, and Hinge gets rid of Dhir! Zipped in full on leg and to be fair to Dhir, this is in the slot. He gets under it too much, though, and only gets the height he wants. Dubey, Hinge's Vidarbha teammate, settles under it at deep mid wicket and makes no mistake. Dhir's scratchy knock comes to an end!

dismissalText.commentary: Hardik Pandya c Klaasen b Sakib Hussain 31 (15b 2x4 2x6 30m) SR: 206.66

dismissalComment.html: smashed straight to long off, and Sakib has gotten the better of the MI skipper! This is a slot ball but it is far outside off, meaning Hardik has to reach out. He tries to do so by going back and across but does not generate the power or elevation he wants. Simple catch for Klaasen, and Hardik has to depart for a 15-ball 31!

dismissalText.commentary: Tilak Varma c Klaasen b Hinge 7 (5b 0x4 1x6 8m) SR: 140

dismissalComment.html: clothed to long off, and SRH continue to turn the screw! Not quite a yorker outside off but full enough to deny Tilak from getting under it. The bat turns upon contact and he arrows it down Klaasen's throat. SRH have been frugal in these past few overs, and MI are losing momentum!

dismissalText.long: c †Ishan Kishan b Nitish Kumar Reddy
dismissalText.commentary: Will Jacks c †Ishan Kishan b Nitish Kumar Reddy 46 (22b 5x4 3x6 38m) SR: 209.09

dismissalComment.html: oh my - what an inspired bowling change! Nitish into the attack, and Nitish into the wickets! Length ball outside off and this seams away just a smidgen. Jacks throws his hands at it but for a change, does not middle it. Only musters a faint outside edge and Kishan does the rest. Big, big moment in the game!

dismissalText.commentary: Suryakumar Yadav c Abhishek Sharma b Malinga 5 (5b 1x4 0x6 7m) SR: 100

dismissalComment.html: skied, and SKY falls cheaply again! Bashed in short outside off and this climbs through on SKY. The ball gets big on him as he tries to swipe at it and the ball skews off the top edge. Abhishek moves around to his left at fine leg and snares the chance. SKY's lean run continues, and SRH have gone back-to-back!

dismissalText.commentary: Naman Dhir c Dubey b Hinge 22 (17b 3x4 0x6 27m) SR: 129.41

dismissalComment.html: goes a mile up, and Hinge gets rid of Dhir! Zipped in full on leg and to be fair to Dhir, this is in the slot. He gets under it too much, though, and only gets the height he wants. Dubey, Hinge's Vidarbha teammate, settles under it at deep mid wicket and makes no mistake. Dhir's scratchy knock comes to an end!

dismissalComment.html: smashed straight to long off, and Sakib has gotten the better of the MI skipper! This is a slot ball but it is far outside off, meaning Hardik has to reach out. He tries to do so by going back and across but does not generate the power or elevation he wants. Simple catch for Klaasen, and Hardik has to depart for a 15-ball 31!

dismissalText.commentary: Abhishek Sharma c Boult b Ghazanfar 45 (24b 4x4 3x6 51m) SR: 187.5

dismissalComment.html: catch it is the cry again and this time, it is taken! And the Wankhede finds its voice! Ghazanfar dangles the carrot outside off. Full enough to make Abhishek bite too but like the previous ball, he slices across it too much. Boult moves to his left from backward point and does the rest. Ghazanfar is fired up, but take nothing away from another tone-setting and bruising Abhishek knock!

dismissalText.commentary: Travis Head c Jacks b Pandya 76 (30b 4x4 8x6 59m) SR: 253.33

dismissalComment.html: squeezed out to extra cover, and MI are turning this game around! Sticks to the plan - very full and outside off. Head looks to carve it through the off side but cannot get under it enough. Cannot keep it down either and the ball arrows to extra cover, where Jacks snaps down ot his left and gobbles up the chance. MI in the ascendancy!

dismissalComment.html: straight up the chimney, and Boult has a wicket, finally! Back of a length just outside off. Nitish looks to dump this over cow corner but the ball gets big on him.
